query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (TABLE_NAME LIKE '%decision%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%command%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%listener%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%broadcast%') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zpoeP3x1cmc7iMR.f2a79e44485f --database eSHiAmKDzW4pqcyH7Ttb7c --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (TABLE_NAME LIKE '%decision%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%command%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%listener%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%broadcast%') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
stdout:
TABLE_NAME
alert_broadcast_log
